message:
test(engine): enrichment tests for IR contract, session hostcall channel, and threshold signing

ir_contract.rs (+318 lines — PearlTower 2026-02-26 session 2):
  Major test enrichment covering schema version validation, canonical value
  content verification for RegRange, Ir3FunctionDesc (with/without names),
  SpecializationLinkage, HostcallDecisionRecord, and extensive Ir3Instruction
  opcode string validation tests. Directly supports PSRP-04.1 Parse Event IR
  schema completion.

session_hostcall_channel.rs (+69 lines):
  Serde roundtrip tests for SharedPayloadDescriptor, BackpressureSignal,
  ChannelPayload variants (Inline, Shared, Backpressure), SessionConfig,
  and edge cases including empty inline payloads.

threshold_signing.rs (+35 lines):
  Serde roundtrip tests for ThresholdScope, ShareHolderId, display formatting
  verification including hex prefix and zero handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
